mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products(seller_id, name, description, category, price, stock_qty, thumbnail_url, expiration_date) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{price}, #{stockQty}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{expirationDate})
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, seller_id, name, description, category, price, stock_qty, thumbnail_url, expiration_date, created_at, updated_at FROM products ORDER BY product_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT product_id, seller_id, name, description, category, price, stock_qty, thumbnail_url, expiration_date, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(AVG(price), 0) AS avgPrice, COALESCE(MIN(price), 0) AS minPrice, COALESCE(MAX(price), 0) AS maxPrice FROM products WHERE category = #{category}
